content: Need some help/advice. Starded the game like 3 days ago and just recently finished trying out all the realms and their characters. I really enjoyed Caro realm gameplay and I've  been trying to get Thais on the  Moonless Guide, but I've only been getting everybody but her. my current team is Tawil, Hameln, Karen, and Caelus. should i stop pulling on the moonless banner and just save my silver?

(legit started playing yesterday)
im starting to feel as though my team is lacking as hell for chapter 3
its still fine, i can relatively easily clear battles/elites/bosses, with my team setup i managed to even do a lvl 20 event quest (hameln event or sumthn) with lvls 1s, but its starting to suck a bit... help would be nice and maybe what to do

(i have saved 10k silver as of right now and have been saving the ethereal cores (35) and have 19 luminous cores as well) standard core wise i basically have none, maybe like 15

For starters, use the ethereal cores before the new patch drops, since they will turn into standard pulls otherwise. Your team looks fine to me for where you are in the game, only change you could probably make is swapping Ramona and Ryker for Murphy and Saya (you get one copy of Saya for free if you beat ch4 before the event ends). Also, add R wheels (seriously, on arc1 they are really strong) and SSR wheels from the shop.
To learn more about the wheels, check Cheri's guide

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:
## General Guide
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=sharing>) by Cheri
- [Game Mechanics](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1511362816362283118) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens Database and Teambuiler](https://skeydb.com/#/database) by Fjant
## Mode Specific

## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University

Hello! I just started playing because I really love Pontos' design. Could I ask for anyone's advice on what team I should aim for as a beginner? 

I've been reading a lot of guides, but I'm honestly a bit confused about what to do, especially regarding the aequors situation where they are good at the start but may fall off the end. My main goal is to pull and use Pontos, but I'm completely open to using other team setups right now if it helps me progress and save up for more pulls. I'd really appreciate any guidance you can offer!

I'm honestly not sure if I should stick with this account or start over. For context, I've only spent the 131 free pure cores so far. I don't mind restarting, I think I can still get the free pulls in Saya's Event asap
yes the mouchette support kinda carried, honestly I'm  kinda glad I brought team 2 for wave 1. that stage seems like hell without corrosion cheese

I don't have Salv unfortunately, but I already beat the boss. 

My team was Pollux, Castor, Hameln, Arachne. Thought I could cheese it with Arachne, but since he cripples your hand/arith at phase 2, only killed him at turn 23 or so.

The most complex boss fight so far. And the arc 1 story finale was peak.

ah okays, will swap the wheels around and see how that works out, thanks! 

e1 saya or wait another month and get e2 mouchette?
read also that for arc2 chpt 3 onwards, the mechanics counter mouchette style of play?
